summary: iter225 ECW Ops Orders Hub testing complete. 17/17 backend tests passed. Mobile Orders Hub has hamburger drawer with 4 nav items (Order Guide, Vendor Catalogs, Orders, Inventory). Orders view has 5 sub-status pills (New, Approval, Placed, Received, Canceled) with search. Vendor Catalogs shows picker + search + items with SKU/pack_size/category/unit_price. Order Guide shows items with qty input and Request FAB. Inventory voice view shows voice toggle (expected 'Voice not supported' in test runners). Tabbar auto-centers active tab on tap (scrollWidth=443 > clientWidth=390). Idempotency for order-request-offline works (duplicate=true on 2nd call with same key).

issues: Transient 'Error loading SystemSettings/Sidebar' on some page loads - recovers on retry

success_rate.frontend: 100% (mobile Orders Hub + tabbar scroll + all 4 drawer views)

test_credentials: X-User-Id: chef-william for writes. devAuth=1 bypass for frontend.
seed_data_creation: 5 vendors seeded (Sysco·Main, US Foods, Local Fish Co, Specialty Meats, Gordon Food Service). 16 vendor catalog items seeded with SKU, pack_size, category, unit_price.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter225 Orders Hub fully tested. Backend: GET /vendors returns 5 seeded vendors. GET /vendor-catalog returns 16 items with filter by vendor_id and case-insensitive q= search. GET /order-guide returns aggregated rows from procurement_orders. POST /order-request-offline is idempotent (duplicate=true on 2nd call with same idempotency_key, returns same requisition). Frontend: Mobile /m/ecw Orders tab shows orders-hub-root. Hamburger (orders-hub-menu) opens drawer with 4 nav items (order-guide, vendor-catalogs, orders, inventory). Orders view has 5 sub-status pills with counts + search. Order Guide has qty inputs + Request FAB. Vendor Catalogs has picker + search + items showing SKU/pack_size/category/unit_price. Inventory voice view has voice toggle (shows 'Voice not supported' in test runners - expected). Tabbar auto-centers on tab tap (scrollWidth=443 > clientWidth=390, scrollLeft changes). Desktop dashboard loads but has transient error state on some loads.
